/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -w -Wall  -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared  -o lib/adios2-evpath-modules-2_11/libadios2_cmenet.so CMakeFiles/cmenet.dir/cmenet.c.o CMakeFiles/cmenet.dir/ip_config.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/jlx/Projects/CAESAR_ALL/ADIOS2/adios2-build/lib: ../../../lib/libadios2_atl.so.2.11.0 ../../../lib/libadios2_enet.so.2.11.0
